sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33679" key="e)lh/laka" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλήλᾰκα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλήλαμαι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐληλέδατο</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλεφαντ-άδατο</orth>, <sense id="n33679.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐλαύνω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλήλεγμαι</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐλέγχω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλήλιγμαι</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἑλίσσω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλήλῠθα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰλήλουθα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλθεῖν</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλθέμεν</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλθέμεναι</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἔρχομαι</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
